description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow has three jobs: clang-format, markdown-link-check, and build. The clang-format job checks code formatting using clang-format 9 on ubuntu-latest. The markdown-link-check job checks markdown links using Node.js 12 on ubuntu-latest. The build job runs a matrix of builds across multiple operating systems and generators, including Windows, Ubuntu, and macOS, with various configurations, and performs cmake, build, and test steps.
